root_causes: 1. GSC API page aggregate (rowLimit=250) returns 213 — but Google only returns rows with significant data
2. Manual GSC UI includes anonymized/low-volume queries the API filters out
3. GSC UI aggregates across ALL dimensions simultaneously; API requires separate calls per dimension
4. API sampling: Google may sample data for large sites; QFINHUB has ~649 pages
5. Some impressions come from pages not in the API response (below threshold)
verdict: KNOWN GSC API LIMITATION — not a bug. The 98-impression gap is from anonymized queries and pages below the API visibility threshold. Manual GSC UI (311) is more complete. Use MANUAL_TRUTH = 311 as baseline.
recommendation: Accept 311 as truth. Flag DATA_GAP_OPEN in daily reports. Continue pulling API for query/page detail, but use manual for aggregate.
